experiment_title: 浓度与温度对NO₂/N₂O₄化学平衡的影响实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="浓度与温度对NO₂/N₂O₄化学平衡的影响实验" goal="通过改变溶液浓度和温度，观察NO₂与N₂O₄混合气体颜色变化，分析浓度和温度对化学平衡的影响。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_a" type="test_tube" capacity="15mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_b" type="test_tube" capacity="15mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_c" type="test_tube" capacity="5mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_d" type="test_tube" capacity="5mL" />
      <Component id="bottle_NO2" type="bottle" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="bottle_N2O4" type="bottle" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="cold_water_bath" type="water_bath" capacity="200mL" />
      <Component id="hot_water_bath" type="water_bath" capacity="200mL" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NO2_N2O4_Mixture" state="gas" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_a" reagent="H2O" volume="10 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_b" reagent="H2O" volume="10 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_a" reagent="NO2/N2O4" volume="5 drops" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_b" reagent="NO2/N2O4" volume="5 drops" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_a" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_b" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_7" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_c" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_d" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" id="step_9" />
      <Insert tool="bottle_NO2" vessel="test_tube_c" id="step_10" />
      <Insert tool="bottle_N2O4" vessel="test_tube_d" id="step_11" />
      <Insert tool="test_tube_c" vessel="cold_water_bath" id="step_12" />
      <Insert tool="test_tube_d" vessel="hot_water_bath" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="1 min" id="step_14" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_15" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 分别在两支试管中加入蒸馏水和NO₂/N₂O₄混合气体，配制平衡体系溶液。
向两支试管中补加蒸馏水，稀释溶液后静置，观察颜色变化，分析浓度对化学平衡的影响。
分别在两支小试管中加入蒸馏水，并分别通入NO₂和N₂O₄气体，构建温度影响实验体系。
将两支小试管分别置于冷水浴和热水浴中，静置后观察颜色变化，分析温度对化学平衡的影响。
